notes: agy auto-executes one tool (run_command/list_dir) inside one turn, then replies. Single-birth adapter (transcript-first, session id = <conv-id> dir). parseUserInput → user_message → working; parsePlannerResponse WITH tool_calls → assistant_message + a synthesized ToolUse (id step_index-i, no native ids); parseToolResult → function_call_output, a NON-settling event that closes the open tool so the turn stays working; terminal empty PLANNER_RESPONSE → turn_done → ready. The state-never-waiting invariant is structural: the antigravity parser has no permission-gate/waiting path on tool execution, so under auto-approve the session cannot flicker to waiting. Tokens/cost not in the JSONL → observations assert tokens_nonzero:false, cost_nonzero:false; model omitted (provisional). INTERACTIVE driver required (headless --print exits before the terminal working→ready edge). driver=gap:wait_turn — record ports wait_turn + the launch_repl session-resolution SEAM first.

text: antigravity session (<conv-id>) appears in ready when transcript.jsonl is written
After one auto-executed tool call (assistant_message+ToolUse → function_call_output, turn stays working), terminal PLANNER_RESPONSE → ready; state NEVER entered waiting
